verse.name: v1
verse.lines: Lord, an exodus has happened When we left this world behind We have followed the Message, We were justified by faith And as we journey through the desert, As we're tried and sanctified The Pillar of Fire, Lord, We'll follow into the Promised Land

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: Now, we're facing the walled cities And the giants in the Land Many have lost heart And the promise they forgot But thank God for the Joshua, The Holy Spirit in our souls Who has declared, "We're more than able to possess the Land."

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: For we are a chosen and peculiar people God has foreordained to possess the Land Not because we are mighty But because He's shown us mercy That one day, on the Cross Christ redeemed what Adam had lost Our inheritance

verse.name: v4
verse.lines: On the other side of Jordan Though the enemies assail We shall not be moved For the promise will not fail This is our inheritance, All of Christ is ours A perfect walk with You, my Lord, Here in the Promised Land

verse.name: v5
verse.lines: The whole creation Has been groaning for the sons of God To manifest in this hour Adopted sons of God Adopted sons of God
